case_title: CHRISTINE KERNS VS. ALDO DIGIULIO ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KERNS, CHRISTINE AS TO DEFENDANT DIGIULIO, ALDO BARNEY'S AUTO CENTER, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAR-15-2017 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ALDO DIGIULIO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

FEES NOT PAID. FILING OF ANSWER TO COMPLAINT BY DEFENDANT ALDO DIGIULIO ON 02/27/17 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
